description_long: This is a classical bust sculpture depicting a distinguished male figure dressed in elaborate military attire. The subject features detailed facial features, a styled wig or hair, and is adorned with epaulettes and medals across his chest, suggesting a high-ranking officer or nobleman. The bust is mounted on a square pedestal base, providing stability and prominence. The surface is smooth and appears to be made of white marble or plaster, with subtle textural details on the clothing and decorations. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, focusing on the general shape of the shoulders and head. The overall craftsmanship emphasizes realism and formality, typical of commemorative or historical portrait busts.
description: A white bust of a male military figure with detailed uniform, medals, and epaulettes, mounted on a square pedestal. The sculpture is smooth and classical in style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the subject's face, detailed uniform, medals, and both epaulettes clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the left epaulette, and the draping of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the less-detailed back of the uniform.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the profile, right epaulette, and the side of the uniform and pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
